_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: we have generated the first comprehensive transcriptomic atlases of dermal skin cells and Tom+ SCs derived from mouse cNFs
details: Generated comprehensive single-cell transcriptomic atlases of dermal skin cells and Tom+ SCs from mouse cutaneous neurofibromas
